2603.29678.title: View-oriented Conversation Compiler for Agent Trace Analysis
2603.29678.paper_summary: Agent traces carry increasing analytical value in the era of context learning and harness-driven agentic cognition, yet most prior work treats conversation format as a trivial engineering detail. Modern agent conversations contain deeply structured content, including nested tool calls and results, chain-of-thought reasoning blocks, sub-agent invocations, context-window compaction boundaries, and harness-injected system directives, whose complexity far exceeds that of simple user-assistant exchanges. Feeding such traces to a reflector or other analytical mechanism in plain text, JSON, YAML, or via grep can materially degrade analysis quality. This paper presents VCC (View-oriented Conversation Compiler), a compiler (lex, parse, IR, lower, emit) that transforms raw agent JSONL logs into a family of structured views: a full view (lossless transcript serving as the canonical line-number coordinate system), a user-interface view (reconstructing the interaction as the user actually perceived it), and an adaptive view (a structure-preserving projection governed by a relevance predicate). In a context-learning experiment on AppWorld, replacing only the reflector's input format, from raw JSONL to VCC-compiled views, leads to higher pass rates across all three model configurations tested, while cutting reflector token consumption by half to two-thirds and producing more concise learned memory. These results suggest that message format functions as infrastructure for context learning, not as an incidental implementation choice.
2603.29678.paper_summary_zh: 代理痕跡在上下文學習和驅動代理認知的時代中具有越來越高的分析價值，然而大多數先前的研究將對話格式視為微不足道的工程細節。現代代理對話包含深度結構化的內容，包括嵌套的工具調用和結果、思維鏈推理塊、副代理調用、上下文窗口壓縮邊界，以及注入的系統指令，其複雜性遠超過簡單的用戶-助手交流。將這些痕跡以純文本、JSON、YAML 或通過 grep 供應給反射器或其他分析機制，可能會顯著降低分析質量。本文提出了 VCC（視圖導向對話編譯器），這是一個編譯器（詞法分析、解析、中間表示、降級、發出），將原始代理 JSONL 日誌轉換為一系列結構化視圖：完整視圖（作為標準行號坐標系的無損記錄）、用戶界面視圖（重建用戶實際感知的交互）以及自適應視圖（由相關性謂詞控制的結構保持投影）。在 AppWorld 的上下文學習實驗中，僅將反射器的輸入格式從原始 JSONL 替換為 VCC 編譯視圖，導致所有三個測試模型配置的通過率提高，同時將反射器的標記消耗減少一半至三分之二，並產生更簡潔的學習記憶。這些結果表明，消息格式作為上下文學習的基礎設施，而不是偶然的實現選擇。
2603.29678.author: Lvmin Zhang et.al.
